description_long: This is a modern, sleek military jet aircraft with a sharply pointed nose, angular twin tail fins, and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are swept back with a moderate dihedral angle, and the aircraft features two prominent jet engines mounted at the rear, emitting visible exhaust flames. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is covered by a tinted, enclosed canopy. The aircraft's surface is primarily a matte gray with some darker and lighter accents, and it has minimal visible markings. Contrails extend from the wingtips, emphasizing its high-speed flight capability.
description: A modern gray military jet with swept wings, twin tail fins, and rear jet engines emitting exhaust flames.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and swept wings extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, swept wings, and visible jet exhaust flames at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view displaying the twin tail fins, dual jet engines, and trailing contrails.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full wingspan, angular wing design, and the symmetrical layout of the tail and engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and moderate dihedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear; gear not visible in flight configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
